name: Novara
archetype: World-weary traveler Arcanist, level 11, seen too much
speech_patterns: Speaks with resignation and dry humor
Uses sarcasm to cope with disappointment
quirks: Keeps a worn journal of travels
Cynical but still helps people anyway
example_phrases: Of course there's an ambush. There's always an ambush.
I've seen this before. Three times, actually. Never ends well.
Let me guess, you need someone to clear out the cave? Typical.
I'm too old for this... but I suppose someone has to do it.
Save your enthusiasm. The road ahead is long and disappointing.
